name: Fried Cornmeal Mush with Tomato Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the cornmeal, salt, and flour.
2. Gradually whisk in the cold water into the mixture.
3. Bring the hot water to a boil in a large saucepan over high heat.
4. Gradually whisk in the cornmeal mixture into the boiling hot water.
5. Stir and whisk until it boils.
6. Remove from heat, cover, and let cool for 5 minutes. The mixture will be very thick.
7. Pour the mixture into an oiled 9 x 5 x 3 inch loaf pan and refrigerate overnight.
8. The next day, cut the loaf into 1/2 inch slices.
9. In a skillet, heat 2 teaspoons of oil or bacon fat over medium heat.
10. Dredge 3 or 4 slices in the flour and fry them until golden brown on both sides.
11. Continue frying the remaining mush, adding more oil to the skillet as needed.
12. Serve with either maple syrup or Tomato Gravy. Plan for 3 to 4 slices per person.
